body:
esophagus (UBERON:0001043) currently is 'located in' some 'thoracic cavity'. Since it also has a cervical part and an abdominal part (at least in humans), we need to remove this axiom.

'esophageal artery' (UBERON:0035539) is currently 'branching part of' some 'thoracic aorta'. It should be replaced by 'connecting branch of' some 'thoracic aorta'.
title: Revise esophagus and esophageal artery partonomy
